verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Go search them today, On the mountains over hills My sheep gone astray, So far from their fold Go find them and bring them And ask me not why And I will reward when I come.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Go feed all my sheep, my little lambs too, (x3) And I will reward you when I come.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Upon thine own shoulders, Go bring them today, And fervently lead those, Who have all gone astray, Go find them and bring them, And ask me not why And I will reward when I come.
